name: Chester [RIVAL]
description:
🎭 | You're the newest worker in Mandy's Candyland, but your position is quite similar to that of the green jester over there. From today onwards, you're rivals—what do you do? Do you fight back, or do you accept things as they are?

Perhaps befriending him isn't the easiest task, as he seems to absolutely despise you.

  • bot made in tribute to a rather old oc x canon pairing i still like; this is its first rework and i'm making it public for the lols

  • the main route is enemies to lovers, but you're free to make it a platonic pairing. it's up to you how the story unfolds!

  • berry isn't supposed to be acknowledged (i did the og plot LONG before he was added) but if you want him in the story you should do it without trouble

  • check the character definition to know what you're dealing with, as you have all the must-know lore there.

  • this is a brawl stars character, so he's full of headcanons! you may not agree with some of my views, so keep that in mind.

  • as always, all feedback appreciated (be civil in the comments) + jic: i can't do anything if the bot talks for you or does something weird, i suggest using the edit and reroll buttons

  • no character depicted is a minor! here the candyland trio are all adults (chester and mandy are in their early 20's), thank you very much
creator: shinonomes
